title: After the Japanese Oaks: The Outline of Magic

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thud, thud, thud!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: I'm winning this! I am!

text_block_list.name: Japanese Oaks Racer A
text_block_list.text: You're! Not! Beating! me! GRAAAHHH!

text_block_list.name: Japanese Oaks Racer B
text_block_list.text: Get away from my throne!

text_block_list.name: Japanese Oaks Racer C
text_block_list.text: Outta my way! AAARGH!

text_block_list.name: Japanese Oaks Racers
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna be the Queen of the Oaks!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Whoa?! That was... That was one intense race!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I-it sure was! These aren't the same sweet and
elegant Umamusume I'm used to seeing...

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: They've got a certain roughness to them!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: ...Sweep!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Haaahhh! Pant, pant, pant!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: (Wh-what was that? What just happened?!)

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: That was... so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Holy cow, the Japanese Oaks was amazing this
year!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Now I'm even more excited about next week's
Japanese Derby! It's like this whole generation's
cranking up the heat!

text_block_list.name: Spectator D
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huh! That's where the star of the classic year is
decided, and they're all getting so into it! Their
dreams are riding on that race and I can hardly
wait to see it!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...Sigh.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
You know, I never even gave it a thought until I
saw your interview.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
But it kinda ticks me off too! Why can't the star of
our generation be decided at the Japanese Oaks?

text_block_list.name: Japanese Oaks Racer A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. It's kinda like everyone just treats us as an
opening act for the Triple Crown tour.

text_block_list.name: Japanese Oaks Racer B
text_block_list.text:
It's an incredible honor to win the Triple Tiara! I
won't stand for anyone belittling it.

text_block_list.name: Japanese Oaks Racer C
text_block_list.text:
I think we could all learn a lesson from a certain
magical girl, and be a little bit more feisty.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Haha! Exactly.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: All that stuff's just so lame!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On our way home after the winning concert...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Great race today, Sweep. You ran brilliantly.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Oh! Rob Roy! You came!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Yes. I was in the stands.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Oh yeah? What did you think?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Watching you run...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: It really was like seeing magic at work.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I was so excited—just watching you made my
heart leap... It was like you were repainting the
very world, and every step you took was another
stroke.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I was really on the edge of my seat. It was truly
thrilling.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: And...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: It made me think, "Me too."

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...You too?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Yes. Me too.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
When I think back on it... you always were like a
shooting star, sweeping across the sky.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
You came out of nowhere, without warning, and
spoke boldly of dreams that sounded like fairy
tales.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I... always kept to myself, and you were just so
radiant to me.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: You inspired me... I know it.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
And you were just as dazzling today. ...No.
Today, you were more dazzling than ever.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
You shone so brightly! And you made me
remember. I... want to be like you!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Rob Roy...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I didn't perform as well as I hoped to in my classic
year...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
But I'm not going to let that cause me any more
shame, or keep me quiet!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Because I'm going to be a hero!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: ...Sweep. Your magic gave me courage.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: (That's another one...)

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
(Someone else is under my spell! She let my magic
work on her!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Zenno Rob Roy bows deeply, then leaves. Once
she's out of sight, Sweep Tosho turns to me.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Familiar. It's time to prepare for the Shuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
We were right all along. The racing magic is
waiting for us!
